title: Requirement
description: Schema for a Valory software requirement.

id.description: Unique requirement identifier in the format REQ-MODULE-NNN (e.g. REQ-AUTH-001).

title.description: Short descriptive title for the requirement.

description.description: Requirement statement in the canonical form: 'The <module> module shall <behavior>.'

rationale.description: PM-provided rationale explaining why this requirement exists.

verification_method.description: Method used to verify this requirement is satisfied.

uses.description: IDs of parent requirements that this requirement depends on or traces up to.

implements.description: IDs of child requirements that this requirement decomposes into.
